basics.name: Zhenbang Zhang
basics.summary: M.Sc. in Machine Learning at MBZUAI | Computational Connectomics | Neural Circuit Reconstruction

work.company: Mohamed bin Zayed University of Artificial Intelligence (MBZUAI) and Shandong University
work.summary: Research on computational foundations for connectomics using volume electron microscopy, focusing on 3D volumetric restoration, isotropic reconstruction, and large-scale circuit mapping.
highlights: Conduct research on computational foundations for connectomics using volume electron microscopy
Focus on 3D volumetric restoration, isotropic reconstruction, and large-scale circuit mapping
Investigate scalable neuron segmentation and tracking methods for dense connectome reconstruction

work.company: Mathematics and Interdisciplinary Science Center, Shandong University
work.summary: Research on computational pipelines for serial-section volume electron microscopy, with emphasis on 3D registration, reconstruction fidelity, and scalability for connectomics datasets.
highlights: Developed Gaussian filter-based 3D registration method for serial section electron microscopy (AAAI 2025)
Proposed unsupervised trajectory-optimization framework based on Neural ODEs (NeurIPS 2025)
Developed vEMRec end-to-end 3D reconstruction pipeline validated on 1TB+ real-world datasets (Advanced Science 2026)

work.company: Mathematics and Interdisciplinary Science Center, Shandong University
work.summary: Worked on computational stitching of ultra-high-resolution microscopy image sequences for large-scale volume electron microscopy reconstruction.
highlights: Developed automatic stitching methods for large-scale volume electron microscopy datasets
Improved continuity across sections for downstream connectomics workflows
Co-first-authored paper on volume electron microscopy stitching (GigaScience 2024)

education.institution: Mohamed bin Zayed University of Artificial Intelligence (MBZUAI)

publications.name: Motion-Residual Conflict-Aware Time Reversal for Generative Inbetweening
publications.publisher: Proceedings of the Forty-Third International Conference on Machine Learning
publications.summary: Zhang, Z., Cui, Z., El-Messiry, H., Han, R., and Xu, Z. Accepted in May 2026.

publications.name: vEMRec: High-Resolution Volume Electron Microscopy Reconstruction Based on Structure-Preserving and High-Fidelity 3D Alignment
publications.summary: Zhang Zhenbang, Li Hongjia, Yang Zhongjun, Xu Zhiqiang, Sun Duanchen, Gao Xin, Zhang Fa, and Han Renmin. An end-to-end 3D reconstruction pipeline for volume electron microscopy, validated on three real-world datasets exceeding 1 TB.

publications.name: Unsupervised Trajectory Optimization for 3D Registration in Serial Section Electron Microscopy using Neural ODEs
publications.summary: Zhang Zhenbang, Feng Jingtong, Li Hongjia, El-Messiry Haythem, Xu Zhiqiang, and Han Renmin. An unsupervised trajectory-optimization framework based on Neural ODEs for 3D registration.

publications.name: A Gaussian Filter-Based 3D Registration Method for Series Section Electron Microscopy
publications.summary: Zhang Zhenbang, Li Hongjia, Xu Zhiqiang, Meng Wenjia, and Han Renmin. A Gaussian filter-based 3D registration method for serial section electron microscopy.

publications.name: vEMstitch: an algorithm for fully automatic image stitching of volume electron microscopy
publications.summary: He Bintao, Zhang Yan, Zhang Zhenbang, Cheng Yiran, Zhang Fa, Sun Fei, and Han Renmin. An algorithm for fully automatic image stitching of volume electron microscopy.
